<?php namespace Aws\Auth; use Aws\Identity\IdentityInterface; /** * An AuthSchemeResolver object determines which auth scheme will be used for request signing. */ interface AuthSchemeResolverInterface { /** * Selects an auth scheme for request signing. * * @param array $authSchemes a priority-ordered list of authentication schemes. * @param array $args * * @return string|null */ public function selectAuthScheme( array $authSchemes, array $args ): ?string; }
